full_text: Kyewuta to Russell, byes, 1 run, Kyewuta nails the wide yorker this time. Russell can't get under it. Scampers through for a bye and

short_text: Kyewuta to Russell, , four more!! Once again full and wide, Russell gets a thick edge on the slash that goes over short
full_text: Kyewuta to Russell, , four more!! Once again full and wide, Russell gets a thick edge on the slash that goes over short third for a boundary

short_text: Kyewuta to Russell, , wide and full outside off, Russell goes reaching for a big slash. Gets an outside edge that flies
full_text: Kyewuta to Russell, , wide and full outside off, Russell goes reaching for a big slash. Gets an outside edge that flies away to the right of the keeper

full_text: Kyewuta to Russell, , too wide outside off

short_text: Kyewuta to Russell, , full and wide, Russell square cuts it over the backward point region for a boundary
full_text: Kyewuta to Russell, , full and wide, Russell square cuts it over the backward point region for a boundary

short_text: Kyewuta to Russell, no run, 136.9 clicks, the perfect yorker, almost as good as the Ishant Sharma one in the IPL. This t
full_text: Kyewuta to Russell, no run, 136.9 clicks, the perfect yorker, almost as good as the Ishant Sharma one in the IPL. This time Russell balances himself and manages to defend

short_text: Kyewuta to Russell, , Russell connects!! Kyewuta attempting a wide yorker, undercooks it and allows Russell to get under
full_text: Kyewuta to Russell, , Russell connects!! Kyewuta attempting a wide yorker, undercooks it and allows Russell to get under it and hoist his drive over extra cover for a boundary

short_text: Juma Miyagi to Russell, 1 run, right in the blockhole on off stump, stabbed down to mid-wicket once again. This has been
full_text: Juma Miyagi to Russell, 1 run, right in the blockhole on off stump, stabbed down to mid-wicket once again. This has been a splendid over from Juma Miyagi, got his execution spot-on!

full_text: Juma Miyagi to Shepherd, 1 run, nails the yorker once again, squeezed out to mid-wicket

full_text: Juma Miyagi to Shepherd, no run, wide yorker, stabbed straight towards the backward point fielder

full_text: Juma Miyagi to Shepherd, 2 runs, pitched up and a bit wider, drilled to the left of long-off this time. Once again well stopped by Riazat Ali Shah

short_text: Juma Miyagi to Shepherd, 2 runs, very full at the stumps, drilled down the ground and well cut off by the long-off field
full_text: Juma Miyagi to Shepherd, 2 runs, very full at the stumps, drilled down the ground and well cut off by the long-off fielder running to his right

full_text: Juma Miyagi to Russell, 1 run, yorker length again from Miyagi. Jammed towards square leg for a single

short_text: Kyewuta to Russell, leg byes, 1 run, painful! A waist high full toss that surprises Russell. He swings and miss, and the
full_text: Kyewuta to Russell, leg byes, 1 run, painful! A waist high full toss that surprises Russell. He swings and miss, and the ball deflects off his thigh pad towards backward point

short_text: Kyewuta to Russell, , , full outside off once again. Russell goes for a big swing once again and gets an outside edge to
full_text: Kyewuta to Russell, , , full outside off once again. Russell goes for a big swing once again and gets an outside edge towards the third-man boundary.

short_text: Kyewuta to Russell, no run, full and quick outside off, a swing and a miss for Russell
full_text: Kyewuta to Russell, no run, full and quick outside off, a swing and a miss for Russell

short_text: Kyewuta to Shepherd, , angling down the leg side, fumbled by the keeper and allows an extra run
full_text: Kyewuta to Shepherd, , angling down the leg side, fumbled by the keeper and allows an extra run

short_text: Kyewuta to Shepherd, no run, full toss on off stump, pushed back to the bowler who stops and feigns a throw back towards
full_text: Kyewuta to Shepherd, no run, full toss on off stump, pushed back to the bowler who stops and feigns a throw back towards Shepherd. The batter is unmoved

short_text: Kyewuta to Rutherford, Bowled!! Knocked over! The bowler is pumped and celebrates in the face of Rutherford, pumps his f
full_text: Kyewuta to Rutherford, Bowled!! Knocked over! The bowler is pumped and celebrates in the face of Rutherford, pumps his fists and gives him a mouthful. A superb response from Kyewuta, yorker at the stumps at good pace. Rutherford is late in jamming his bat down, ends up going through him and dislodging the off stump.

short_text: Kyewuta to Rutherford, , good length angling outside off, slashed square of the wicket for a boundary. Flies away to the
full_text: Kyewuta to Rutherford, , good length angling outside off, slashed square of the wicket for a boundary. Flies away to the left of the backward point fielder

short_text: Kyewuta to Rutherford, no run, full outside off, driven towards the cover fielder
full_text: Kyewuta to Rutherford, no run, full outside off, driven towards the cover fielder

short_text: Dinesh Nakrani to Russell, , off cutter outside off. Russell waits this time and then cutely dabs it between backward po
full_text: Dinesh Nakrani to Russell, , off cutter outside off. Russell waits this time and then cutely dabs it between backward point and short third for a boundary. Not all about brute force for Andre

short_text: Dinesh Nakrani to Russell, no run, pace off length ball outside off. Keeps low and goes under the bat as Russell goes fo
full_text: Dinesh Nakrani to Russell, no run, pace off length ball outside off. Keeps low and goes under the bat as Russell goes for a big heave across the line

full_text: Dinesh Nakrani to Rutherford, 1 run, good length just outside off, cut into the ground towards point for a single

full_text: Dinesh Nakrani to Russell, 1 run, low full toss, hacked across the line but along the ground towards deep mid-wicket

full_text: Masaba to Russell, 1 run, quicker onto middle and leg, driven to long-on.

full_text: Masaba to Rutherford, 1 run, ends with an off spinner to the left hander. Pitched up just outside off, Rutherford leans closer to push it towards cover point

full_text: Masaba to Russell, 1 run, googly onto leg stump, tucked to deep mid-wicket

short_text: Masaba to Powell, Caught by Robinson Obuya!! Out now!! Flat delivery outside off, allowing the width as Powell slaps it
full_text: Masaba to Powell, Caught by Robinson Obuya!! Out now!! Flat delivery outside off, allowing the width as Powell slaps it through extra cover. Looked like it might go over the fielder but Obuya times his jump perfectly. Stretches every sinew to get to that ball and deliver an important breakthrough.

short_text: Masaba to Powell, , too far wide outside off
full_text: Masaba to Powell, , too far wide outside off

full_text: Masaba to Powell, no run, once again a googly from a short of length as Powell advanced. The batter forced to defend

full_text: Masaba to Powell, no run, stumping missed!! A golden opportunity goes begging. Powell dances down the track and Masaba dishes out a googly from a short of length. Goes through the batter who didn't know where the ball was. Keeper fumbles and Powell gets a life!

full_text: Dinesh Nakrani to Powell, 1 run, low full toss, driven down to long-off

full_text: Dinesh Nakrani to Rutherford, , pace off delivery angling onto the pads. Rutherford just works it on its way on the sweep to the right of short fine

full_text: Masaba to Powell, no run, ends with a leg spinner, fuller in length and just outside off. Powell tried to cut but couldn't connect

full_text: Masaba to Rutherford, , half tracker, a bit too short from Masaba. Rutherford stays back, climbs under it and smokes it over deep mid-wicket beyond the boundary ropes for six

full_text: Masaba to Powell, 1 run, bowls it flat and wide seeing Powell advance. Slapped powerfully towards sweeper cover by the WI skipper

full_text: Dinesh Nakrani to Rutherford, 1 run, nudged towards midwicket and Rutherford gets off the mark with a single. He eyes the second but gets rightly sent back

full_text: Dinesh Nakrani to Rutherford, no run, 100.2kph, slower delivery, Rutherford is early to close his bat-face and misses it to get hit on the pad. Going down leg and hence no lbw appeal

full_text: Dinesh Nakrani to Charles, Caught by Alpesh Ramjani!! 117.6kph, full toss, Charles walks forward and across to mow it over cow corner. No timing on it as it hits high on the bat. Ramjani comes in from long-on to take a good, sharp, low catch. Nakrani strikes in his first over.

full_text: Masaba to Charles, , misfield and four! 99.2kph, quicker one around off, Charles cuts to backward point and Nakrani makes a mess of it. The ball has the legs to reach the fence.

full_text: Masaba to Powell, 3 runs, turning leggie, Powell drives and gets an outside edge even as the bat makes contact with his pad. Backward point dives to his left but fails to stop it cleanly which results in the batters taking three

short_text: Masaba to Pooran, Caught&Bowled!! Scrambled seam, slightly short and Pooran shapes to pull it away off the back foot. On
full_text: Masaba to Pooran, Caught&Bowled!! Scrambled seam, slightly short and Pooran shapes to pull it away off the back foot. Only manages to get a top-edge as it skids off the deck and the ball lobs up in the air. Masaba, the bowler, moves back, settles under it and catches it calmly. Punches the air in delight as he knows the value of this wicket.

full_text: Masaba to Charles, no run, tossed up leggie, not much spin, Charles wants to dispatch it over long-off but connects with thin air. Beaten on the inside edge

full_text: Masaba to Pooran, , waltzes down the track does Pooran, isn't quite to the pitch of the ball but he swings hard to loft it high and over long-on for an 88m six

full_text: Nsubuga to Charles, , Charles gets down on one leg to slogsweep. Noit quite off the middle of the bat and it's the longer boundary. Mukasa, a few inches in front of rope at deep midwicket, jumps but the ball goes over him. Had he been bac, he might have had a better chance to catch it...

full_text: Nsubuga to Pooran, 1 run, 89.6kph, round the wicket, full in length, Pooran gets forward and pushes it towards cover for a quick single

full_text: Juma Miyagi to Pooran, , harmless short ball that sits up nicely for the batter. Pooran stands tall and pummels it over deep square leg for an 86m six

full_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Pooran, , Pooran gets off the mark with a towering six. Full and in the slot, Pooran is quick to get down and unleash the slogsweep it over deep midwicket. High and handsome

full_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Pooran, no run, 93.6kph, push-driven to mid-off

short_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Brandon King, Bowled!! FOUR and OUT! 94.9kph, quicker one from the left-armer, skids off the deck and
full_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Brandon King, Bowled!! FOUR and OUT! 94.9kph, quicker one from the left-armer, skids off the deck and Brandon King is late into his shot as he goes back to flick it away. Beats the inside edge, thuds into his pads before deflecting onto the sticks.

short_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Brandon King, , 88.8kph, top shot. Brandon King manufactures room by backing away a long way. The ball
full_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Brandon King, , 88.8kph, top shot. Brandon King manufactures room by backing away a long way. The ball is outside leg and King still manages to slap it through extra cover

full_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Brandon King, 2 runs, shimmies down the track, gets too close to the pitch and chip-drives it just past the bowler beating him to his right

full_text: Kyewuta to Charles, no run, 135.5kph, yorker length, jammed to cover

full_text: Kyewuta to Brandon King, 1 run, 140.2kph, pitched up, driven straight to mid-off for a risky single.

short_text: Kyewuta to Charles, 3 runs, 130.5kph, Charles backs away to loft over mid-off. Miscues off the lower part of the bat. Mi
full_text: Kyewuta to Charles, 3 runs, 130.5kph, Charles backs away to loft over mid-off. Miscues off the lower part of the bat. Mid-off (Riazat) back-pedals and covers good distance but he fails to hold onto the catch as he tries to take it with his palms facing the sky. Good effort but in vain. The ball threatens to go to the fence but extra cover hares back, slides and pulls it back in

short_text: Kyewuta to Charles, no run, 137kph, pitched up, Charles drives to mid-off
full_text: Kyewuta to Charles, no run, 137kph, pitched up, Charles drives to mid-off

short_text: Kyewuta to Charles, , 115.8kph, pace off and full in length. Charles backs away and backs himself to clear the fence. Be
full_text: Kyewuta to Charles, , 115.8kph, pace off and full in length. Charles backs away and backs himself to clear the fence. Bends his back leg and swings over long-on. Holds his shape and gets enough elevation to hit it over the fielder in the deep for an 88m six

short_text: Kyewuta to Charles, no run, 135.7kph, Kyewuta follows a backing away batter and Charles clips this full delivery to midw
full_text: Kyewuta to Charles, no run, 135.7kph, Kyewuta follows a backing away batter and Charles clips this full delivery to midwicket

short_text: Juma Miyagi to Charles, 1 run, 132kph, Miyagi pulls his length back and Charles hurriedly pulls towards square leg.
full_text: Juma Miyagi to Charles, 1 run, 132kph, Miyagi pulls his length back and Charles hurriedly pulls towards square leg.

short_text: Juma Miyagi to Charles, , through the gap! Low full toss at 135.9kph and Charles gets forward to drive through the cover
full_text: Juma Miyagi to Charles, , through the gap! Low full toss at 135.9kph and Charles gets forward to drive through the covers. Third boundary of the over

short_text: Juma Miyagi to Charles, no run, pitched up delivery on middle, Charles drives straight to cover
full_text: Juma Miyagi to Charles, no run, pitched up delivery on middle, Charles drives straight to cover

short_text: Juma Miyagi to Charles, , four off the free-hit! 122.6kph, pace off, full and wide of off, Charles clears his front leg,
full_text: Juma Miyagi to Charles, , four off the free-hit! 122.6kph, pace off, full and wide of off, Charles clears his front leg, bends his back leg and swings hard to club it over midwicket. One bounce and into the fence

short_text: Juma Miyagi to Charles, , 133.8kph, short of length ball that angles in and straightens a bit off the deck. Charles trie
full_text: Juma Miyagi to Charles, , 133.8kph, short of length ball that angles in and straightens a bit off the deck. Charles tries to drive from the crease and is beaten on the outside edge. Miyagi has overstepped

short_text: Juma Miyagi to Brandon King, 1 run, 136.7kph, pitched up, driven towards mid-off for a quick single
full_text: Juma Miyagi to Brandon King, 1 run, 136.7kph, pitched up, driven towards mid-off for a quick single

short_text: Juma Miyagi to Brandon King, , 131.8kph, Miyagi greeted with a boundary. Makes a cracking sound. Back of a length ball w
full_text: Juma Miyagi to Brandon King, , 131.8kph, Miyagi greeted with a boundary. Makes a cracking sound. Back of a length ball with width on offer. Brandon King stands tall and slaps it through extra cover. Doesn't bother to run

short_text: Kyewuta to Charles, , 141.3kph, short of length, Charles makes room by moving leg-side and slashes hard to slap it up an
full_text: Kyewuta to Charles, , 141.3kph, short of length, Charles makes room by moving leg-side and slashes hard to slap it up and over cover. Reaches the fence in a jiffy. Five dots and a boundary off the final ball of the over

short_text: Kyewuta to Charles, no run, 136.2kph, Charles backs away and opens his bat-face to drive. Good contact but he can't find
full_text: Kyewuta to Charles, no run, 136.2kph, Charles backs away and opens his bat-face to drive. Good contact but he can't find the gap through point

full_text: Kyewuta to Charles, no run, 113.3kph, slower ball, Charles spots it late and turns it to midwicket

full_text: Kyewuta to Charles, no run, 137.5kph, full toss and Kyewuta gets away as Charles fails to find the gap through the covers with his drive

full_text: Kyewuta to Charles, no run, 139.6kph, on a length again, Charles shapes to heave across the line and inside-edges towards mid-on

full_text: Kyewuta to Charles, no run, 141.1kph, good length ball angling in on off and middle, pushed back to the bowler

full_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Charles, 1 run, 81.8kph, slow turn from a length, punched to long-off

short_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Charles, no run, 80.5kph, Charles moves leg-side to loft downtown. Misses the inside edge and thuds in
full_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Charles, no run, 80.5kph, Charles moves leg-side to loft downtown. Misses the inside edge and thuds into the keeper's pad. Low bounce!

short_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Charles, no run, very full and that's been jammed back at the bowler
full_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Charles, no run, very full and that's been jammed back at the bowler

short_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Charles, byes, , 83.1kph, in-drifter, slides on with the arm, Charles stands outside leg to drive and
full_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Charles, byes, , 83.1kph, in-drifter, slides on with the arm, Charles stands outside leg to drive and is beaten on the inside edge. The ball eludes the leg-stump and goes past the keeper  before running away to the fine leg fence

short_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Brandon King, 1 run, 83.4kph, full around off, driven to long-off off the front foot
full_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Brandon King, 1 run, 83.4kph, full around off, driven to long-off off the front foot

full_text: Alpesh Ramjani to Brandon King, no run, round the wicket, tossed up, very full and that's been played back at the bowler

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nsubuga, Bowled!! Length delivery, Nsubuga looks to defend and misses the line of the delivery to be c
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nsubuga, Bowled!! Length delivery, Nsubuga looks to defend and misses the line of the delivery to be clean bowled. This is the joint lowest total in T20 WC. Alzarri Joseph has been relentless and gets his second wicket. Nsubuga was clueless as has been the case with his mates. Windies win by 134 runs and has helped their NRR massively. Early finish for the hosts.

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Juma Miyagi, 1 run, very full, Juma Miyagi looks to clip it and the ball goes off the leading edge and
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Juma Miyagi, 1 run, very full, Juma Miyagi looks to clip it and the ball goes off the leading edge and down to deep cover for a single

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Juma Miyagi, 2 runs, back of a length delivery, outside off, Juma Miyagi stabs it wide of the man at p
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Juma Miyagi, 2 runs, back of a length delivery, outside off, Juma Miyagi stabs it wide of the man at point for a brace. They ran well to get the double

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nsubuga, leg byes, 1 run, darts in from a length. Nsubuga looked to defend and the ball went off the p
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nsubuga, leg byes, 1 run, darts in from a length. Nsubuga looked to defend and the ball went off the pads into the off-side for a single

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nsubuga, no run, back of a length delivery, outside off, Nsubuga dropped his wrists and let it go
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Nsubuga, no run, back of a length delivery, outside off, Nsubuga dropped his wrists and let it go

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Juma Miyagi, 1 run, gets it down for a single as that was hit to the mid-on region. There was a direct
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Juma Miyagi, 1 run, gets it down for a single as that was hit to the mid-on region. There was a direct hit at the bowler's end but he had made it

short_text: Motie to Kyewuta, Lbw!! Struck on the pads and given. They had a review but the batter was hit plumb in front of the sti
full_text: Motie to Kyewuta, Lbw!! Struck on the pads and given. They had a review but the batter was hit plumb in front of the sticks. Was darted in and Kyewuta missed the line of the delivery. The umpire had one look before signalling it out. 9th one down. Motie also getting into the act now.

short_text: Motie to Juma Miyagi, 1 run, Juma Miyagi pushes it away and gets it just wide of cover for a single. Almost chipped the
full_text: Motie to Juma Miyagi, 1 run, Juma Miyagi pushes it away and gets it just wide of cover for a single. Almost chipped the ball to the fielder there

short_text: Motie to Juma Miyagi, no run, fuller length delivery, on the pads, whips it down to mid-wicket
full_text: Motie to Juma Miyagi, no run, fuller length delivery, on the pads, whips it down to mid-wicket

full_text: Motie to Juma Miyagi, no run, very full, Juma Miyagi looks to whack it and cue-ends the ball down into the deck

full_text: Motie to Juma Miyagi, no run, gets a stride out and defends it down to mid-wicket

full_text: Motie to Juma Miyagi, 2 runs, flatter one, Juma Miyagi whips it and sends it wide of mid-wicket. Good running earns them a brace

full_text: Shepherd to Juma Miyagi, 1 run, fuller length delivery, outside off, Juma Miyagi stays behind the line of the delivery and pats it down to deep cover for a single

full_text: Shepherd to Juma Miyagi, no run, length delivery, outside off, Juma Miyagi looks to punch it and misses

full_text: Shepherd to Kyewuta, no run, that's a short ball at 140 clicks. Kyewuta sees the line and bails out of the push outside off

full_text: Shepherd to Juma Miyagi, 1 run, short of length delivery at 86.5 mph, Juma Miyagi dabs the ball down to third man. Just used the pace of the bowler

full_text: Shepherd to Juma Miyagi, no run, on a length, outside off, Juma Miyagi looked to punch it and misses

full_text: Motie to Juma Miyagi, no run, flatter one, Juma Miyagi stays back and punches it to the man at cover

full_text: Motie to Juma Miyagi, no run, fuller length delivery, Juma Miyagi looked to slog it away and misses. That didn't miss the sticks by much

full_text: Motie to Juma Miyagi, no run, good thinking to give it to Motie. Was fired in fuller on the pads, Juma Miyagi looked to clip it and misses

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Kyewuta, no run, gets the ball to angle away at 87.2 mph. Kyewuta looked to push at it and misses

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Kyewuta, no run, some more perfume ball for number 10. The aroma was rejected as he decided to sway aw
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Kyewuta, no run, some more perfume ball for number 10. The aroma was rejected as he decided to sway away from it. Was a quick short ball from Alzarri Joseph

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Masaba, Caught by Pooran!! Another one goes. Strangled down leg. Was a short ball, around the left sho
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Masaba, Caught by Pooran!! Another one goes. Strangled down leg. Was a short ball, around the left shoulder. Masaba looke to pull and only managed to glove it down to the keeper. Pooran took it easily and made a polite appeal. The umpire raised his finger quickly. 8th one down and Windies looking to give their NRR a massive facelift. Uganda might have triumphed against PNG but they are struggling here.

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Juma Miyagi, 1 run, and takes the edge but no one at fourth slip. Back of a length delivery, takes off
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Juma Miyagi, 1 run, and takes the edge but no one at fourth slip. Back of a length delivery, takes off, Juma Miyagi gets an edge down to third man for a single

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Juma Miyagi, no run, back of a length delivery, outside off, Juma Miyagi had no clues about it. That d
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Juma Miyagi, no run, back of a length delivery, outside off, Juma Miyagi had no clues about it. That darted away and Juma Miyagi dropped his wrists in a hurry

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Masaba, leg byes, 1 run, angles it in, on a length and the batter misses the tuck. They get a single a
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Masaba, leg byes, 1 run, angles it in, on a length and the batter misses the tuck. They get a single as the ball dribbled off the pads

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Juma Miyagi, no run, flatter one, Juma Miyagi looks to defend and gets an inside edge on to the pads
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Juma Miyagi, no run, flatter one, Juma Miyagi looks to defend and gets an inside edge on to the pads

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Waiswa, Lbw!! I0$ and that too has happened in a WC game. Was an arm ball and Waiswa tried to prod fowar
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Waiswa, Lbw!! I0$ and that too has happened in a WC game. Was an arm ball and Waiswa tried to prod foward but missed the line of the delivery. He had to review it and he did but in vain. 7th one down inside the powerplay. They are reeling. Akeal Hosein has been on fire. He has continously attacked the sticks. Excellent attacking bowling from him as he has attacked the sticks.

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Waiswa, no run, and beats the inside edge. Quicker one, outside off, Waiswa looked to drive and missed t
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Waiswa, no run, and beats the inside edge. Quicker one, outside off, Waiswa looked to drive and missed the line of the delivery. The keeper fumbled it

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Masaba, 1 run, too full, Masaba push drives it down to long-off for a single
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Masaba, 1 run, too full, Masaba push drives it down to long-off for a single

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Masaba, no run, two slips in place! And Masaba looked to paddle the first ball he plays. Was a quicker o
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Masaba, no run, two slips in place! And Masaba looked to paddle the first ball he plays. Was a quicker one, spun in a little

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Dinesh Nakrani, Bowled!! The procession of wickets continue. That was a tossed up delivery, outside off,
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Dinesh Nakrani, Bowled!! The procession of wickets continue. That was a tossed up delivery, outside off, turns in big and Dinesh Nakrani misses the line of the delivery to be clean bowled. Excellent captaincy from Powell to give the final over to Akeal Hosein on the trot and he has delivered. 6th one down for Uganda. Fourth wicket for Hosein. Golden chance for him to add a fifer here. The bowler managed to traverse the gap as he prodded forward.

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, no run, fuller length delivery, that seams away a lot! The keeper dives to his right and stops
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, no run, fuller length delivery, that seams away a lot! The keeper dives to his right and stops it. Waiswa was nowhere near that one as he tried to flay it away

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, no run, hits him high on the pads as the ball angled in. Waiswa didn't use his feet much and t
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, no run, hits him high on the pads as the ball angled in. Waiswa didn't use his feet much and tried to defend it

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, no run, 86.6 mph, angling in, from a back of a length spot. Waiswa nudges the ball down to the
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, no run, 86.6 mph, angling in, from a back of a length spot. Waiswa nudges the ball down to the man at square leg

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, , back of a length delivery, down leg, at 85.3 mph, Waiswa looked to heave it away but missed
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, , back of a length delivery, down leg, at 85.3 mph, Waiswa looked to heave it away but missed

full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, no run, shortish delivery, Waiswa lets it go by ducking down. Was quick from Alzarri Joseph

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, no run, back of a length delivery, Waiswa steps down the track and pats it out into the off-si
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, no run, back of a length delivery, Waiswa steps down the track and pats it out into the off-side

short_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, no run, and that's a lovely back of a length delivery. Waiswa hangs his bat out outside off an
full_text: Alzarri Joseph to Waiswa, no run, and that's a lovely back of a length delivery. Waiswa hangs his bat out outside off and misses it. He is getting some movement here

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Waiswa, 1 run, and taps the paddle down to fine leg for a single as that was an arm ball from Akeal Hose
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Waiswa, 1 run, and taps the paddle down to fine leg for a single as that was an arm ball from Akeal Hosein

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Dinesh Nakrani, leg byes, 1 run, tossed up delivery, Dinesh Nakrani gets a stride out and looks to nudge
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Dinesh Nakrani, leg byes, 1 run, tossed up delivery, Dinesh Nakrani gets a stride out and looks to nudge it. There was an appeal. But there was too much of turn on this. They get a single

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Riazat Ali Shah, Bowled!! Clean bowled! That was the arm ball, darts in and Riazat Ali Shah looks to cut
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Riazat Ali Shah, Bowled!! Clean bowled! That was the arm ball, darts in and Riazat Ali Shah looks to cut but misses the line of the delivery. Uganda have lost half their side. They have been clueless against Akeal Hosein. He has been on top of his game as well. The first two balls spun in and attacked the outside edge. This time it darted in and Riazat Ali Shah wasn't ready for it. Windies eyeing an early finish.

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Riazat Ali Shah, no run, the arm ball and Riazat Ali Shah misses the line of the delivery. That dangled
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Riazat Ali Shah, no run, the arm ball and Riazat Ali Shah misses the line of the delivery. That dangled in and Riazat Ali Shah was late on it but was doing too much and hence the review wasn't taken

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Riazat Ali Shah, no run, gets the ball to turn away, Riazat Ali Shah looks to defend and gets beaten aga
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Riazat Ali Shah, no run, gets the ball to turn away, Riazat Ali Shah looks to defend and gets beaten again

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Riazat Ali Shah, no run, tossed up delivery, lands and turns to beat the prod forward. He is looking to
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Riazat Ali Shah, no run, tossed up delivery, lands and turns to beat the prod forward. He is looking to give it a rip

short_text: Russell to Waiswa, no run, Russell nails the yorker. Waiswa does well to get the bat down in time and dig it out. Russel
full_text: Russell to Waiswa, no run, Russell nails the yorker. Waiswa does well to get the bat down in time and dig it out. Russell had his hands on head as he also knew it was a good yorker

short_text: Russell to Riazat Ali Shah, 1 run, one more. Every run has come at a price. Back of a length and dabbed down to third ma
full_text: Russell to Riazat Ali Shah, 1 run, one more. Every run has come at a price. Back of a length and dabbed down to third man off the back foot

short_text: Russell to Riazat Ali Shah, 2 runs, short of length delivery, outside off, dabbed down to third man for a brace as that
full_text: Russell to Riazat Ali Shah, 2 runs, short of length delivery, outside off, dabbed down to third man for a brace as that was played away fine

short_text: Russell to Riazat Ali Shah, no run, 84 mph, Riazat Ali Shah gets behind the line of the delivery and defends it out into
full_text: Russell to Riazat Ali Shah, no run, 84 mph, Riazat Ali Shah gets behind the line of the delivery and defends it out into the off-side. Got it off the outer-half of the bat

short_text: Russell to Riazat Ali Shah, no run, length delivery, outside off, stabbed down to the man at point
full_text: Russell to Riazat Ali Shah, no run, length delivery, outside off, stabbed down to the man at point

short_text: Russell to Riazat Ali Shah, , fuller length delivery, slips down leg and Riazat Ali Shah misses the clip for it to be wi
full_text: Russell to Riazat Ali Shah, , fuller length delivery, slips down leg and Riazat Ali Shah misses the clip for it to be wided

short_text: Russell to Robinson Obuya, Bowled!! This is superb from Dre Russ. Lovely away movement after it landed and Robinson Obuy
full_text: Russell to Robinson Obuya, Bowled!! This is superb from Dre Russ. Lovely away movement after it landed and Robinson Obuya missed the line of the delivery to be clean bowled. The off stick was pegged back. The batter didn't move his feet much and that went against him. First ball of the evening from Russell and he strikes immediately. Uganda have had top order issues and the free fall has happened today as well.

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Alpesh Ramjani, Lbw!! Uganda in deep trouble. They are going down like a lead balloon. Was a flatter one
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Alpesh Ramjani, Lbw!! Uganda in deep trouble. They are going down like a lead balloon. Was a flatter one, Alpesh Ramjani sat down to slog sweep it but missed the quicker ball. That looked adjacent to the sticks. They thought of a review but decided against it. Third one back in the hut and Windies looking to better their NRR.

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, flatter one, stabbed back to the bowler. Almost chipped it back
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, flatter one, stabbed back to the bowler. Almost chipped it back

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Alpesh Ramjani, , and four! Connects this time to send it behind square. That was a flatter one, Alpesh
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Alpesh Ramjani, , and four! Connects this time to send it behind square. That was a flatter one, Alpesh Ramjani sat down and slog swept it behind square for a four

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, looks to slog sweep and misses as that was flatter outside off
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, looks to slog sweep and misses as that was flatter outside off

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Robinson Obuya, 1 run, what happened there? The arm ball and Robinson Obuya somehow gets an inside edge
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Robinson Obuya, 1 run, what happened there? The arm ball and Robinson Obuya somehow gets an inside edge and that saves the batter. That was fired in. There was an appeal but they didn't review

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Robinson Obuya, no run, fuller length delivery, Robinson Obuya drives it down to mid-off

full_text: Shepherd to Alpesh Ramjani, no run, full and angling across outside off, driven towards the point fielder

full_text: Shepherd to Robinson Obuya, 1 run, back of length and straight, Obuya with a tap and run towards covers

full_text: Shepherd to Alpesh Ramjani, 1 run, very full near the boots, clipped towards deep backward square leg

short_text: Shepherd to Simon Ssesazi, Caught by Alzarri Joseph!! Out gone!! The Uganda openers are underwhelming once again. Pushed
full_text: Shepherd to Simon Ssesazi, Caught by Alzarri Joseph!! Out gone!! The Uganda openers are underwhelming once again. Pushed a bit fuller onto off stump, heaved across the line with no real timing. Easy catch for Joseph at mid-on. Ssesazi looks at his bat as though that were the culprit, walks off..

short_text: Shepherd to Simon Ssesazi, , hard length delivery at the body, pulled away behind square and runs down to the boundary.
full_text: Shepherd to Simon Ssesazi, , hard length delivery at the body, pulled away behind square and runs down to the boundary. A tepid effort in the deep by Rutherford in all fairness

full_text: Shepherd to Simon Ssesazi, no run, on a length and skids through to off stump. Gets an inside edge towards short fine

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Robinson Obuya, no run, sharp turn and bounce to beat the bat outside off

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Robinson Obuya, , fired full and wide, Obuya drives it square of the wicket between point and backward point for a boundary

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Robinson Obuya, no run, fired in at the stumps, Obuya goes for a big heave and gets an inside edge onto his thigh pad

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Robinson Obuya, no run, flat delivery darted through on a length. Cut into the pitch by Obuya

short_text: Akeal Hosein to Mukasa, Lbw!! Gone second ball. The slider from Akeal Hosein. Pushed through fuller and Mukasa tried an
full_text: Akeal Hosein to Mukasa, Lbw!! Gone second ball. The slider from Akeal Hosein. Pushed through fuller and Mukasa tried an audacious switch hit. He misses and is struck bang in front of middle stump. Contemplates a review but takes too long, and has to walk back now. That looked pretty plumb in all fairness

full_text: Akeal Hosein to Mukasa, no run, sharp turn straightaway with the hard ball. Pitches on off and spins away to beat the outside edge
